LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Ironbark.label: Ironbark
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Ironbark.description:
Unit Archive: NCL-05 "Ironbark" Codename: Cityburner Origin: NCL "Iron Law" Siege Series Legacy Protocols
This colossal war machine designated "Ironbark" served as primary siege and area-denial unit. Its bark-like bio-mechanical armor provides exceptional impact resistance, while complex internal systems enable gradual self-repair under non-critical damage - epitomizing high-survivability suppression platforms.
Combat methodology is brutally efficient: Fore-mounted "Ground Splitter" arms equipped with high-frequency vibro-blades tear through light vehicles and cover at close quarters. Rear-mounted nozzles eject high-temperature adhesive pyrogel in wide arcs, igniting all contaminated targets for prolonged combustion.
Most lethally, its persistent thermal radiation field penetrates cover to scorch nearby units and disrupt cloaking devices. Engaging Ironbark at close range is tactical suicide.
As final contingency, Ironbark can deliberately detonate its reactor core to unleash devastating thermokinetic shockwaves - codenamed "Megaton Blast".
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Ironbark.tools.0.label: Ground Splitter
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Ironbark.tools.1.label: Ground Splitter
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Ironbark.tools.2.label: Ironbark Canopy
